title: Platinum Plus Credit Card | Mashreq
description: Unlock rewards and benefits with the Mashreq Platinum Plus Credit Card, including up to AED 750 welcome bonus and various lifestyle advantages.
mainContent: Unlock rewards with up to 10x Mashreq Vantage reward points. Enjoy welcome bonus of AED 750 for new customers when you spend AED 5,000 in the first 2 months post card issuance. Benefits include airport lounge access, discounts on movie tickets, and discounts on flights and hotels. Maximise Mashreq Vantage reward points on supermarket, fuel, and other everyday spends. Enjoy 50% off on movie tickets from selected cinemas, complimentary airport lounge access, and exclusive discounts on travel bookings.
headings: Unlock rewards with up to 10x Mashreq Vantage reward points. Earn 10 points per AED at supermarket, fuel spends & dining , 2 points per AED on international spends and other local spends, 1 Mashreq Vantage points for every AED 1 on local spends on Government payments, utilities, education, charity,rental & telecom spends.

Unlock AED 750 Welcome Bonus. For new credit card customers: AED 750 Welcome Bonus on the card when you spend AED 5,000 in the first 2 months post card issuance. For existing credit card customers: AED 200 Welcome Bonus on the card when you spend AED 5,000 or more in the first 2 months post card issuance.
Maximise Mashreq Vantage reward points on supermarket, fuel and on other everyday spends

Lights, camera, savings! Get 50% off on movie tickets. VOX, Reel, and Novo Cinemas: Get 4 movie tickets each billing month at 50% off. Cinepolis Cinemas: Get 8 movie tickets each billing month at 50% off until 31 December 2026.
Complimentary airport lounge access. Unwind in style with access to over 1,000 lounges, worldwide. Simply spend AED 7,000 or more per month and enjoy 4 complimentary lounge visits in a year

Fly high with discounts. Instant 10% discount of up to AED 80 plus 10% Make My Trip (MMT) reward in your MMT wallet of up to AED 80. Minimum transaction value requirement is AED 600 . Use coupon code: MASHREQPP

Stay in style for less. Stay in style for less. Instant 15% discount of up to AED 300 plus 15% Make My Trip (MMT) reward bonus in your MMT wallet of up to AED 300. Minimum transaction value requirement is AED 300. Use coupon code: MASHREQPP
Ready to get your Mashreq Platinum Plus Credit Card?

No Hidden Fees - Annual Fee Primary 299+ 5% VAT -Supplementary: Free for life, Interest free period Up to 57 days - Interest rates 3.85% p.m, PayProtect insurance - 0.99% of your monthly statement balance (+ 5% VAT)
